query:
-- Suppress the 5 weak-fit projects from Daniel's pool (Daniel-only suppression via danielZecSuppressed flag doesn't exist, so we use the suppressedReason or we note them for the digest filter)
-- Actually, we should NOT globally suppress these — they may be valid for other reps.
-- Instead, we document the verdicts and apply targeted suppression only where appropriate.
-- For now, just verify the current state of all projects before making any changes.
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.suppressed, p.priority, p.productLane, p.sector
FROM projects p
WHERE p.id IN ('330035','210007','330017','120346','210028','960006','450027','990050','120238')
ORDER BY p.id;

-- Suppress the 5 weak-fit projects from Daniel's pool (Daniel-only suppression via danielZecSuppressed flag doesn't exist, so we use the suppressedReason or we note them for the digest filter)
-- Actually, we should NOT globally suppress these — they may be valid for other reps.
-- Instead, we document the verdicts and apply targeted suppression only where appropriate.
-- For now, just verify the current state of all projects before making any changes.
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.suppressed, p.priority, p.productLane, p.sector
FROM projects p
WHERE p.id IN ('330035','210007','330017','120346','210028','960006','450027','990050','120238')
ORDER BY p.id;
